tagline: Embedded compute credentials: Compute credentials are now embedded for all users of a Genie Space.
what_it_does: Embedded compute credentials: Compute credentials are now embedded for all users of a Genie Space. These credentials are embedded when a Genie Space author changes the attached warehouse in the Genie Space. Paginated column lists: Column lists in the Configure tab are now paginated for improved usability, especially for rendering tables with many columns.
why_it_matters: Paginated column lists: Column lists in the Configure tab are now paginated for improved usability, especially for rendering tables with many columns.
plain_summary: Embedded compute credentials: Compute credentials are now embedded for all users of a Genie Space. These credentials are embedded when a Genie Space author changes the attached warehouse in the Genie Space.
key_takeaway: Embedded compute credentials: Compute credentials are now embedded for all users of a Genie Space.
